name: Portuguese Sweet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the ingredients according to the manufacturer's instructions.
2. Combine all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.
3. Mix until the dough is well combined and smooth.
4. Shape the dough into loaves of the desired size (small, medium, or large).
5. Place the shaped loaves into greased baking pans.
6. Allow the dough to rise until it has doubled in size.
7. Preheat your oven according to the manufacturer's instructions.
8. Bake the bread for the specified time, usually around 30-40 minutes, until golden brown and cooked through.
9. Remove the baked loaves from the oven and let them cool on a wire rack before serving.
